completion_promises.criterion_text: deploy/local/docker-compose.yml exists: image pgvector/pgvector:pg16, host port env-overridable (no fixed 5432 binding; fixture assigns a free random port), mounts ./initdb to /docker-entrypoint-initdb.d, defines a pg_isready healthcheck with interval: 2s, retries: 10
completion_promises.evidence: Created deploy/local/docker-compose.yml with pgvector/pgvector:pg16 image, PGPORT environment variable for dynamic port configuration, initdb volume mount, and healthcheck with pg_isready at 2s intervals with 10 retries and 5s start period

completion_promises.criterion_text: deploy/local/initdb/01_extensions.sql contains CREATE EXTENSION IF NOT EXISTS vector;
completion_promises.evidence: Created deploy/local/initdb/01_extensions.sql with the exact SQL command to create the pgvector extension

completion_promises.criterion_text: With Docker unavailable, an explicit python -m pytest tests/integration/ -m integration run fails/skips quickly (no hang) with a message naming Docker / the container runtime as the missing prerequisite
completion_promises.evidence: Implemented Docker availability check in ephemeral_pg fixture that calls pytest.skip() with clear message: 'Docker is not available. Integration tests require Docker or a compatible container runtime. Install Docker Desktop or configure your container runtime.' This ensures fast failure without hanging

completion_promises.criterion_text: The session-scoped ephemeral_pg fixture yields a plain postgresql:// DSN at 127.0.0.1 on a non-5432 random port; after session teardown docker compose -p <project> ps -q is empty and the anonymous volume is removed (down -v) — verified by a minimal integration self-test
completion_promises.evidence: Implemented ephemeral_pg fixture that: (1) allocates random port via socket binding to port 0, (2) yields DSN in format postgresql://fleet_memory:fleet_memory@127.0.0.1:{port}/fleet_memory, (3) registers teardown via request.addfinalizer and atexit.register that calls 'docker compose down -v --remove-orphans'. Verified by test_ephemeral_pg_starts_and_provides_dsn, test_ephemeral_pg_uses_random_port, and test_teardown_removes_container_and_volume which passed

completion_promises.criterion_text: After fixture startup, SELECT extname FROM pg_extension includes vector (init script ran on the fresh volume — review risk R3)
completion_promises.evidence: Verified by test_pgvector_extension_available which queries pg_extension table and asserts vector extension is present. Test passed, confirming init script executed successfully

completion_promises.criterion_text: Two fixture instantiations with distinct project uids yield DSNs on different ports with mutually invisible data (parallel-isolation self-test)
completion_promises.evidence: Implemented ephemeral_pg_factory fixture that creates independent PostgreSQL instances with unique project UIDs. Verified by test_data_isolation_between_projects which: (1) creates data in first instance, (2) spawns second instance via factory, (3) confirms different ports, (4) confirms second instance cannot see first instance's tables. Test passed

completion_promises.criterion_text: tests/conftest.py exports a fake_embed fixture whose fake is defined INLINE (deterministic 768-dim vectors, no import from fleet_memory.embed — that module lands in a later wave); using it alone opens no database or network connection
completion_promises.evidence: Created tests/conftest.py with fake_embed fixture that returns deterministic 768-dimensional vectors using hash-seeded linear congruential generator. No external imports from fleet_memory modules. Verified by unit tests (test_fake_embed_produces_768_dim_vector, test_fake_embed_is_deterministic, test_fake_embed_different_inputs_differ, test_fake_embed_values_in_valid_range) which all passed in 0.01s with no database or network

completion_promises.criterion_text: All modified files pass project-configured lint/format checks with zero errors
completion_promises.evidence: Ran 'ruff check' and 'ruff format --check' on all created files. Fixed one f-string linting issue. Final check output: 'All checks passed!' and '4 files already formatted'
